mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM favorite_task f JOIN training_task t ON f.task_id = t.id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} AND t.deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM submission s WHERE s.deleted = 0 AND s.student_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM submission s WHERE s.deleted = 0 AND s.student_id = #{userId} AND s.approval_status = 2
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM training_task WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM submission WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM submission WHERE deleted = 0 AND approval_status = 2
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM training_task WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM training_task WHERE deleted = 0 AND deadline IS NOT NULL AND deadline < NOW()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM submission s WHERE s.deleted = 0 AND s.id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT submission_id FROM evaluation_result)

SELECT t.id, t.title, t.subject, t.status, t.deadline, t.create_time FROM training_task t JOIN favorite_task f ON t.id = f.task_id WHERE t.deleted = 0 AND f.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY f.create_time DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT t.id, t.title, t.subject, t.status, t.deadline, t.create_time, COALESCE(s.sub_cnt, 0) AS submissionCount, COALESCE(e.eval_cnt, 0) AS evaluatedCount FROM training_task t LEFT JOIN ( SELECT task_id, COUNT(*) AS sub_cnt FROM submission WHERE deleted = 0 GROUP BY task_id ) s ON t.id = s.task_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT task_id, COUNT(*) AS eval_cnt FROM submission WHERE deleted = 0 AND approval_status = 2 GROUP BY task_id ) e ON t.id = e.task_id WHERE t.deleted = 0 ORDER BY t.create_time DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT s.id, s.submit_time, t.title AS task_title FROM submission s LEFT JOIN training_task t ON s.task_id = t.id WHERE s.deleted = 0 AND s.student_id = #{userId} ORDER BY s.create_time DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT s.id, s.submit_time, t.title AS task_title, COALESCE(u.real_name, '') AS student_name FROM submission s LEFT JOIN training_task t ON s.task_id = t.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON s.student_id = u.id WHERE s.deleted = 0 ORDER BY s.create_time DESC LIMIT 5
